title: 67 blocker
description: Removes any form of 6 7 (really really strict) from chat, replacing it with "bad number". This includes things like "6 blah blah 7", "sSsIIIIXxX SEV33EENNNNN", etc etc.
body:
This mod blocks any form of the word/number 6 7 in chat, replacing it with "bad number", including things like:
"6 blah blah 7", 
"sSsII1IXxX SEV33EENNNNN", 
etc etc.

## How to use
Just paste it into your mod folder, and launch the game

## How to configure
This mod has no configuration options (if you could think of any, join the discord server in my profile)
